'''lu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:river|river]]". It has inherent '''inanimate''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-?-?
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:river|river]]
|-
! Inherent gender
| inanimate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || læ?ïf?ïfth || læ?ïf?ïfj || læ?ïf?ïfsh || læ?ïf?ïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || la?ïf?ïf?ïfth || la?ïf?ïf?ïfj || la?ïf?ïf?ïfsh || la?ïf?ïf?ïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || la?ïf?ïfth || la?ïf?ïfj || la?ïf?ïfsh || la?ïf?ïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || la?ïff?ïffth || la?ïff?ïffj || la?ïff?ïffsh || la?ïff?ïff
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for inanimate singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || la?ïf?ïfïf || la?ïf?ïfïf || la?ïf?ïfïf || la?ïf?ïfïf
|-
| [[Patient]] || la?ïf?ïfth || la?ïf?ïfj || la?ïf?ïfsh || la?ïf?ïf
|-
| [[Possessive]] || la?ïf?ïfïfl || la?ïf?ïfïfl || la?ïf?ïfïfl || la?ïf?ïfïfl
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || la?ïf?ïfïfïf || la?ïf?ïfïfïf || la?ïf?ïfïfïf || la?ïf?ïfïfïf
|-
| [[Dative]] || la?ïf?ïfïfn || la?ïf?ïfïfn || la?ïf?ïfïfn || la?ïf?ïfïfn
|-
| [[Speaker]] || la?ïf?ïfïforo || la?ïf?ïfïforo || la?ïf?ïfïforo || la?ïf?ïfïforo
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki inanimate nouns]]
[[Category:Irregular words]]
[[Category:Words 66806d6]]
[[Category:words 8d63c8d]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words ebaeb35]]
[[Category:Words 307a66b]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
